newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. The record Q2 FY26 results (revenue $1.164B, non-GAAP EPS $2.05), raised mid-teens+ FY26 revenue guidance, $355M record program wins, and the JPMorgan credit-facility expansion all predate the window and were already reflected in the prior case.

verdicts.rankRationale: No new fundamental evidence since June 9; record Q2 beat, raised FY26 guide and credit-facility expansion already priced. On this crowding-sensitive residual-alpha list the +92% YTD rerating keeps eroding hidden alpha, but no new catalyst warrants a move. Hold at 17.
verdicts.bull: Record revenue/EPS, mid-teens+ FY26 guide, $4.0B funnel and $355M program wins; clean AI cloud/network manufacturing proxy.
verdicts.neutral: Strong but well-flagged; +92% YTD leaves little residual alpha versus passives on this list.
verdicts.bear: Price above ~$277.50 median target; EMS multiple re-rated, crowding risk on an underfollowed-name screen.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: FY26 mid-teens+ revenue growth and funnel-to-win conversion.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Valuation/crowding after large YTD rerating; cyclical EMS demand.
